response.global_analysis: Strict Verification: 1. Audio phonetically matches conversational dialogue between the VTubers; no vocal music was detected as per the reference JSON. 2. Reference JSON correctly identifies the scene as conversational. 3. Subtitles cover the full duration of the video. 4. Confirmed text aligns precisely with audio vocalizations and includes on-screen character dialogue boxes.

subtitles.original: Okay, and then can you straighten it out?
subtitles.english: Okay, and then can you straighten it out?

subtitles.original: Yeah, yeah, yeah, just a little bit more.
subtitles.english: Yeah, yeah, yeah, just a little bit more.

subtitles.original: Okay, yeah, and then can you just scoot the whole thing over to the right?
subtitles.english: Okay, yeah, and then can you just scoot the whole thing over to the right?

subtitles.original: What about me? Should I do the same?
subtitles.english: What about me? Should I do the same?

subtitles.original: No, other way! Whoa, whoa, whoa!
subtitles.english: No, other way! Whoa, whoa, whoa!

subtitles.original: I am here where I am.
subtitles.english: I am here where I am.

subtitles.original: Oh, I don't believe this is happening. Oh!
subtitles.english: Oh, I don't believe this is happening. Oh!

subtitles.original: Do you have eyes? Ah, ah, ah, do you have eyes?
subtitles.english: Do you have eyes? Ah, ah, ah, do you have eyes?

subtitles.original: I want you both to walk backwards, okay?
subtitles.english: I want you both to walk backwards, okay?

subtitles.original: Step... maybe straighten out a little bit.
subtitles.english: Step... maybe straighten out a little bit.

subtitles.original: Back... No, actually, you're perfect, Shiori.
subtitles.english: Back... No, actually, you're perfect, Shiori.

subtitles.original: This way! Forward again! Forward again!
subtitles.english: This way! Forward again! Forward again!

subtitles.original: No! Move it over to the right!
subtitles.english: No! Move it over to the right!

subtitles.original: My right? My right? My right?
subtitles.english: My right? My right? My right?

subtitles.original: I don't think I can do this!
subtitles.english: I don't think I can do this!

subtitles.original: Okay, okay, place the other one down!
subtitles.english: Okay, okay, place the other one down!

subtitles.original: I don't want to! I don't want to have to continue like this!
subtitles.english: I don't want to! I don't want to have to continue like this!

subtitles.original: Oh my god! Trust me here!
subtitles.english: Oh my god! Trust me here!

subtitles.original: This way! No, where I am!
subtitles.english: This way! No, where I am!

subtitles.original: Yeah, our faces have to be like this for real!
subtitles.english: Yeah, our faces have to be like this for real!

subtitles.original: Oh my god, Bijou! Okay, Bijou, yeah! Come towards the sound of my voice!
subtitles.english: Oh my god, Bijou! Okay, Bijou, yeah! Come towards the sound of my voice!

subtitles.original: Where is the sound of your voice?!
subtitles.english: Where is the sound of your voice?!

subtitles.original: Okay, stop. Now come this way a little bit.
subtitles.english: Okay, stop. Now come this way a little bit.

subtitles.original: Do you hear where I am?
subtitles.english: Do you hear where I am?

subtitles.original: Pretend... pretend you're in an immersive game, okay?
subtitles.english: Pretend... pretend you're in an immersive game, okay?

subtitles.original: Oh yes, I heard... I felt your voice!
subtitles.english: Oh yes, I heard... I felt your voice!

subtitles.original: Perfect, perfect. Okay, stop, stop, stop.
subtitles.english: Perfect, perfect. Okay, stop, stop, stop.

subtitles.original: Okay, now I want you to turn a little bit this way.
subtitles.english: Okay, now I want you to turn a little bit this way.

subtitles.original: And this is all wrong! Oh!
subtitles.english: And this is all wrong! Oh!

subtitles.original: Okay, so now I want you to place the one in your left hand down, okay?
subtitles.english: Okay, so now I want you to place the one in your left hand down, okay?

subtitles.original: Yeah, okay. Now I want you to walk slightly in this direction.
subtitles.english: Yeah, okay. Now I want you to walk slightly in this direction.

subtitles.original: Like an immersive game. Feel it like a game, Bijou!
subtitles.english: Like an immersive game. Feel it like a game, Bijou!

subtitles.original: Okay. Now onto the other one.
subtitles.english: Okay. Now onto the other one.

subtitles.original: So, Bijou, you're... walk this way.
subtitles.english: So, Bijou, you're... walk this way.

subtitles.original: Okay! Which way is this way?
subtitles.english: Okay! Which way is this way?

subtitles.original: Wait! No, that's the wrong way! Pick it back up!
subtitles.english: Wait! No, that's the wrong way! Pick it back up!

subtitles.original: Okay! Uh... behind you! Move backwards, backwards, backwards...
subtitles.english: Okay! Uh... behind you! Move backwards, backwards, backwards...

subtitles.original: At least my face looks a bit better than Fuwawa's.
subtitles.english: At least my face looks a bit better than Fuwawa's.

subtitles.original: Yeah, yeah. Now walk to your left.
subtitles.english: Yeah, yeah. Now walk to your left.

subtitles.original: No, no, sorry, right! I think you messed up!
subtitles.english: No, no, sorry, right! I think you messed up!

subtitles.original: This way! Left, left, left! This way!
subtitles.english: This way! Left, left, left! This way!

subtitles.original: Wait, I think I... make it work!
subtitles.english: Wait, I think I... make it work!

subtitles.original: Make it work by brute force!
subtitles.english: Make it work by brute force!

subtitles.original: Don't worry about it! Don't worry about it!
subtitles.english: Don't worry about it! Don't worry about it!

subtitles.original: Okay, I want you guys to turn on around,
subtitles.english: Okay, I want you guys to turn on around,

subtitles.original: and we're going to take off your blindfolds
subtitles.english: and we're going to take off your blindfolds

subtitles.original: so you can see how you did, okay?
subtitles.english: so you can see how you did, okay?

subtitles.original: There's no way to look at it.
subtitles.english: There's no way to look at it.

subtitles.original: Pokey, what do you think? Isn't it good?
subtitles.english: Pokey, what do you think? Isn't it good?

subtitles.original: Hey, Bijou, Shiori! You sure this is Fuwawa and Mococo?
subtitles.english: Hey, Bijou, Shiori! You sure this is Fuwawa and Mococo?

subtitles.original: Yeah, look at it! Something seems a little...
subtitles.english: Yeah, look at it! Something seems a little...

subtitles.original: Nah, nah, nah, it looks great!
subtitles.english: Nah, nah, nah, it looks great!

subtitles.original: It's not upside down or anything!
subtitles.english: It's not upside down or anything!

subtitles.original: Wait, can we have a donut please?
subtitles.english: Wait, can we have a donut please?

subtitles.original: It's perfect! It's perfect this way!
subtitles.english: It's perfect! It's perfect this way!

subtitles.original: Wait, wait, wait! What about this over here?
subtitles.english: Wait, wait, wait! What about this over here?

subtitles.original: Look at... look! Yeah! That's great!
subtitles.english: Look at... look! Yeah! That's great!

subtitles.original: I mean, the precision you see here...
subtitles.english: I mean, the precision you see here...

subtitles.original: I mean, the precision you see to do it like this,
subtitles.english: I mean, the precision you see to do it like this,

subtitles.original: because I just wanted to see what it would look like just a little lower.
subtitles.english: because I just wanted to see what it would look like just a little lower.

subtitles.original: Well, is it good enough to get changed back, Pokey?
subtitles.english: Well, is it good enough to get changed back, Pokey?

subtitles.original: Hmph, fine. I'll change them back!
subtitles.english: Hmph, fine. I'll change them back!
